creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Okay even without SDDM it gpg started working when:
security.bsd.see_other_uids=1
security.bsd.see_other_gids=1

So there is a security tradeoff between pcsc and seeing all other pids of all users what seems bad :-(

Also I think those information should land in the pkg-message? :-)
